content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally across IT, FMCG, Auto, Defense, Metals, and Financials with multiple sector leaders posting gap-up moves on Q4 results. Global cues constructive (US +1.46%, Nasdaq +2.02%). Portfolio is fully deployed across 11 CNC names — focus must be position management (trail SLs into strength), not new entries given cluster concentration and a -53.7% experiment-to-date drawdown.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24800,
      "nifty_resistance": 25200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1040.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1056.70, +7.4% from entry 984. Trail SL from 1035 to 1040 (1.6% below CMP, respects 1% trail-gap floor). Q4 PAT +19% YoY, GNPA <1%, BULLISH research sentiment. Target 1110 intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 124.12 vs entry 125.10, marginal -0.8%. SL 121 (-2.5%) intact. Geopolitical hedge value retained; MACD bearish but price holding above SMA20. No trail justified yet."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1757.10, +3.4% from entry 1700. Q4 PAT +9% YoY, revenue +25% FY26, broke 52-wk high. Trail SL from 1720 to 1735 (1.3% below CMP, locks gain, respects trail-gap floor). Target 1820 intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4575.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 4630.40, +1.2%. Q4 results May 14 — binary event in 5 sessions, just outside 3-session danger window but approaching. Trail SL from 4540 to 4575 (breakeven, 1.2% below CMP). If position drifts toward May 13, will reassess for partial trim."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 7049, +2.2% from entry 6900. Q4 results already out (revenue +34%, EBITDA +80%). Original SL 6905 was tight (-0.07%); trail to 6960 (1.3% below CMP) — tightens but respects trail-gap floor. Target 7400 intact (52-wk high 7200 nearby resistance)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 836.00,
      "new_target": 900.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 845.20, +0.9% from entry 838. Original SL 836 too tight given +9.84% day move; keep SL at 836 (no-op, but acknowledged). Q4 results pending May — binary risk noted. Holding HOLD effectively. Withdrawing MODIFY — emit HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 368.70 vs entry 369, flat. Q4 PAT +30.6% YoY, fresh 52-wk high today. SL 363 (-1.6%) appropriate. Target 388 within reach. Will trail once +2% achieved."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 860.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 822.55, +0.3% from entry 820. Fresh ATH 843.15 today, Q4 revenue +22%, India volume +9%, MOFSL target 950. Trail SL from 815 to 820 (breakeven, 0.3% below CMP — borderline trail-gap; acceptable on a low-vol FMCG name post-Q4 with confirmed thesis)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1279.10, +1.6% from entry 1259. Gapped up 11% post Q4 (PAT +130%, rev +29%). SL 1253 (-2%) is appropriate. Will trail when P&L crosses +2%. Encora dilution overhang noted."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 3034 vs entry 3025, +0.3%. Q4 PAT +24%, +49% in April — extended. SL 2980 (-1.5%) appropriate. Defense cluster (HAL+GRSE+TITAGARH) already concentrated; not adding to BHARATFORG/BDL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 807.30, +0.2% from entry 806. Fresh post-Q4 surge, EBITDA margin record 46.5%. SL 800 (-0.7%) very tight; respect chart structure and let it run toward target 855. Will trail once +2%."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "INTRADAY",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY 600x HFCL @ 133.50 placed >30 hours ago. Stale order across days — cancel rather than stack. Will let order desk manage; not emitting new entry."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1040.00,
      "reasoning": "+7.4% unrealized; lock gains, 1.6% trail gap respected."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Marginal P&L; geopolitical hedge thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "reasoning": "+3.4%, breakout to 52-wk high; lock gain."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 4575.00,
      "reasoning": "Breakeven SL ahead of May 14 Q4 binary; will partial-trim closer to event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 already out and bullish; tighten but respect 1.3% trail gap."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Original SL 836 already very tight; no improvement justified yet."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Flat from entry; ATH structure, current SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "reasoning": "Move SL to breakeven post Q4 beat; ATH structure."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Gap-up day, give breathing room; SL 1253 appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Marginal P&L; SL 2980 below recent swing low."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Tight SL respects post-result structure; let it work."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Multiple bullish setups (M&M, ADANIPORTS extension, AUROPHARMA, HDFCBANK, BAJAJ-AUTO, POLYCAB) but portfolio is already 100% deployed across 11 names with significant cluster exposure: Financials (PNBHOUSING + ABCAPITAL + CAMS = ~3 names), Capital Goods/Defense (HAL + GRSE + TITAGARH = 3 names), FMCG (MARICO). No room to add without trimming. NEULANDLAB watched — bearish research with -60% Q3 PAT; avoid. CHOLAHLDNG board meeting tomorrow (May 8) — binary, avoid fresh entry. LUPIN earnings today — binary, avoid. New entries gated until: (a) one or more existing names hit target/SL freeing capital, or (b) a high-conviction setup justifies trimming an existing position.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Experiment-to-date drawdown -53.7% is severe — capital preservation is paramount. Current book is fundamentally well-positioned (most names just reported strong Q4, multiple at 52-wk highs), but the priority is locking in gains via trailing SLs, not chasing new breakouts. Defense cluster (HAL+GRSE+TITAGARH) is at the cluster cap — no BHARATFORG/BDL/BHARAT-DYNAMICS additions today despite tempting setups. HAL and CHOLAHLDNG carry binary-event proximity: HAL Q4 May 14 (5 sessions, will tighten further closer in); CHOLAHLDNG board May 8 (we don't hold). Stale HFCL OPEN MIS order from 30+ hours ago needs operational cleanup — flagging for cancel."
}
